heading: Overtime pay for FBI employees detailed to House Committee on Appropriations
label: 4315 Overtime pay for FBI employees detailed to House Committee on Appropriations
text: The Federal Bureau of Investigation, notwithstanding any other provision of law, may in any fiscal year pay all administrative uncontrollable overtime accrued by its employees while on detail to the Committee on Appropriations.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified as a note under prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 72a of this title
